## cogeni watch

Watch files and re-run generation on changes

### Synopsis

Watch the entry script and all its dependencies, re-running the generation process whenever a file changes.

```
cogeni watch [script.lua] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for watch
```
